title: Pivot gate valve
abstract: This invention relates to a pivot gate-type valve 10 for use in high-pressure slurry systems. The valve 10 comprises a valve housing 12 defining a flow passage 14 therethrough for operatively receiving a fluid and a valve closure 16 which is pivotably progressively displaceable D, transversely to the flow passage 14, between a closed position and an open position. The valve 10 also includes displacing means 18 for displacing the closure 16 between its respective open and closed positions, and which is pivotably connected to the housing 12 whereby it is able to pivot E, relative to the housing 12, when the closure 16 displaces between its open and closed positions.
claims: Claims 1 . According to the invention, there is provided a pivot valve (10) comprising: a valve housing (12) defining a fluid flow passage (14) therethrough for operatively receiving a fluid; a valve closure (16) which is pivotably progressively displaceable (D), transversely to the flow passage (14), between a closed position, wherein the closure (16) overlies the flow passage (14) and closes it, whereby fluid is prevented from flowing past the closure (16) in the flow passage(14), and an open position, wherein the closure (16) is displaced, at least partially, from the flow passage (14) whereby the flow passage (14) is, at least partially, open and fluid is permitted to flow therein past the closure (16); and displacing means (18) for displacing the closure (16) between its respective open and closed positions, the displacing means (18) being pivotably connected to the housing (12) whereby it is able to pivot relative to the housing (12) when the closure (16) displaces between its open and closed positions. 2. The pivot valve (10) according to claim 1 , wherein the displacing means (18) includes an arm (26) whose operatively lower end (28) is connected to the closure (16) and a height adjustment mechanism (30) for raising and lowering the arm (26) to thereby adjust the position of the closure (16). 3. The pivot valve (10) according to claim 2, wherein the height adjustment mechanism (30) is operated by any one of manually, hydraulically, pneumatically, and electrically. 4. The pivot valve (10) according to claim 2 or 3, wherein the inclination a of the arm (26), with respect to the vertical, changes as the closure (16) displaces between its open and closed positions. 5. The pivot valve (10) according to claim 1 , wherein the displacing means (18) is pivotably connected (E) to the housing (12) by it being supported on a clevis (32) that protrudes upwardly from the housing (12). 6. The pivot valve (10) according to claim 1 , wherein the displacing means (18) is connected to the closure (16) intermediate its pivot axis and a sealing portion that overlies the flow passage (14) when the closure (16) is in its closed position. 7. The pivot valve (18) according to claim 1 , substantially as herein described with reference to the accompanying Figures.
